title: Tender Steam French Lard Confit
description: A traditional French dish from Provence featuring tender lard, this recipe is a halal-friendly version using a molcajete as the cooking vessel, perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: Rinse the lard under cold water and pat it dry with paper towels.
In the molcajete, combine the garlic, thyme, rosemary, bay leaves, black pepper, and salt.
Add the lard to the molcajete, making sure it is covered by the aromatics.
Pour in the water, ensuring the lard is submerged.
Cover the molcajete with a lid or plastic wrap.
Place the molcajete over a steamer basket in a large pot filled with boiling water.
Steam the lard for 2 hours, or until it is tender and easily shreds with a fork.
Remove the molcajete from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Shred the lard into bite-sized pieces and serve warm.
